from pyspark.sql import functions as F

CASE_REF_FILE = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/Horizon_CaseReference.csv"

case_ref = (
    spark.read
        .format("csv")
        .option("header", True)
        .option("sep", "|")
        .option("multiLine", True)          
        .option("quote", '"')               # handle quoted fields
        .option("escape", '"')              # handle escaped quotes
        .option("mode", "PERMISSIVE")       # don’t fail on bad rows
        .option("inferSchema", False)       # safer for messy exports
        .load(CASE_REF_FILE)
)

display(case_ref.limit(5))
print("case_ref rows:", case_ref.count())

PREFIXES = ["ROW/"]

prefix_filter = None
for p in PREFIXES:
    cond = F.col("CaseReference").startswith(p)
    prefix_filter = cond if prefix_filter is None else (prefix_filter | cond)

filtered_cases = (
    case_ref
    .filter(prefix_filter & F.col("CaseParentId").isNotNull())
    .select(
        F.col("CaseNodeId").alias("caseNodeId"),
        F.col("CaseReference").alias("hznReference"),
        F.col("CaseParentId").alias("CaseParentId")
    )
    .withColumn(
        "IsLead",
        F.when(F.col("caseNodeId") == F.col("CaseParentId"), F.lit("True"))
         .otherwise(F.lit("False"))
    )
)




display(filtered_cases.limit(50))
print("filtered cases:", filtered_cases.count())

filtered_linked_cases = (
    filtered_cases
    .filter((filtered_cases.IsLead != True) | filtered_cases.IsLead.isNull())
    .withColumnRenamed("CaseParentId", "temp_col")
    .withColumnRenamed("caseNodeId", "CaseParentId")
    .withColumnRenamed("temp_col", "caseNodeId") # actual parent
)
#display(filtered_linked_cases.limit(4))

reordered_cases = filtered_linked_cases.select(
    "caseNodeId",
    "hznReference",
    "CaseParentId",
    "IsLead"
)

display(reordered_cases.limit(4))

true_linked_cases = (
    filtered_cases
    .filter(filtered_cases.IsLead == True)
   
)
display(true_linked_cases.limit(3))

final_union = true_linked_cases.unionByName(reordered_cases)
display(final_union.limit(30))

CASES_FILE = f"{mpesc_base_path}/config/Cases/Cases.csv"

cases_gui_ref = (
    spark.read
        .format("csv")
        .option("header", True)
        .option("sep", ",")
        .option("multiLine", True)          
        .option("quote", '"')               # handle quoted fields
        .option("escape", '"')              # handle escaped quotes
        .option("mode", "PERMISSIVE")       # don’t fail on bad rows
        .option("inferSchema", False)       # safer for messy exports
        .load(CASES_FILE)
)

display(cases_gui_ref.limit(5))
print("case_ref rows:", cases_gui_ref.count())

# Attach CaseParentId GUID associated with a caseNodeId
joined_df = (
    #filtered_cases
    final_union
        .join(
            cases_gui_ref.select(
                #F.col("Case ID").alias("CaseParentId"),
                F.col("Case ID").alias("caseNodeId"),
                F.col("GUID")
            ),
            on="caseNodeId",
            #on="CaseParentId",
            how="inner"
        )
)
display(joined_df.limit(50))

# ??????????

# delete from dbo.[LinkedCase] where reference in ('ROW/3175722','ROW/3175724')
joined_df_cp = (
    #filtered_cases
    final_union
        .join(
            cases_gui_ref.select(
                F.col("Case ID").alias("CaseParentId"),
                F.col("GUID")
            ),
            on="CaseParentId",
            how="inner"
        )
)
display(joined_df_cp.limit(50))

linked_cases_f = (
    joined_df
    #.filter((filtered_cases.IsLead != True) | filtered_cases.IsLead.isNull())
    .withColumnRenamed("CaseParentId", "temp_col")
    .withColumnRenamed("caseNodeId", "CaseParentId")
    .withColumnRenamed("temp_col", "caseNodeId") # actual parent
)
display(linked_cases_f.limit(4))

from notebookutils import mssparkutils
from pyspark.sql import functions as F

workspace = mssparkutils.env.getWorkspaceName()

# -------------------------------------------------
# Environment mapping
# -------------------------------------------------

if workspace == "pins-synw-odw-prod-uks":
    server = "pins-sql-peas-primary-training.database.windows.net"
    database = "pins-sqldb-peas-training"
    akv_name = "pins-kv-peas-training"
    secret_name = "peas-sql-app-connection-string"

elif workspace == "pins-synw-odw-dev-uks":
    server = "pins-sql-peas-primary-dev.database.windows.net"
    database = "pins-sqldb-peas-dev"
    akv_name = "pinskvsynwodwdevuks"
    secret_name = "mpesc-sql-password"

else:
    raise ValueError(f"Unknown workspace '{workspace}'")

# -------------------------------------------------
# Build JDBC URL
# -------------------------------------------------

url = (
    f"jdbc:sqlserver://{server}:1433;"
    f"database={database};"
    "encrypt=true;"
    "trustServerCertificate=false;"
    "hostNameInCertificate=*.database.windows.net;"
    "loginTimeout=30;"
)

# -------------------------------------------------
# Get secret
# -------------------------------------------------

secret_value = mssparkutils.credentials.getSecret(
    akv_name,
    secret_name
)

# -------------------------------------------------
# Training uses connection string secret
# Dev uses direct password secret
# -------------------------------------------------

if secret_name == "peas-sql-app-connection-string":
    parts = {
        kv.split("=", 1)[0].strip().lower(): kv.split("=", 1)[1].strip()
        for kv in secret_value.split(";")
        if "=" in kv
    }

    user = parts.get("user id") or parts.get("uid") or parts.get("user")
    password = parts.get("password") or parts.get("pwd")

    if not user:
        raise ValueError(f"User ID not found in {secret_name} (KV={akv_name})")

    if not password:
        raise ValueError(f"Password not found in {secret_name} (KV={akv_name})")

else:
    # Dev
    user = "peas_app_ZXzkE0vP"
    password = secret_value


# -------------------------------------------------
# Read dbo.[User]
# -------------------------------------------------

user_df = (
    spark.read
    .format("jdbc")
    .option("url", url)
    .option("dbtable", "dbo.[LinkedCase]")
    .option("user", user)
    .option("password", password)
    .load()
)

# -------------------------------------------------
# Show all tables
# -------------------------------------------------

tables_df = (
    spark.read
        .format("jdbc")
        .option("url", url)
        .option("dbtable", "INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES")
        .option("user", user)
        .option("password", password)
        .load()
)
# tables_df.show(n=tables_df.count(), truncate=False)

# -------------------------------------------------
# schema of a specific table
# -------------------------------------------------
schema_df = (
    spark.read
        .format("jdbc")
        .option("url", url)
        .option("dbtable", "INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS")
        .option("user", user)
        .option("password", password)
        .load()
        .filter(F.col("TABLE_NAME") == "LinkedCase")
)

#  schema_df.select("COLUMN_NAME", "DATA_TYPE", "IS_NULLABLE").show(truncate=False)
# -------------------------------------------------



user_clean = user_df
display(user_clean.limit(200))
